mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_member (group_id, user_key, role, status, joined_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userKey}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_key = #{userKey} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT g.group_id as groupId, g.name, g.description, g.leader_user_key as leaderUserKey, g.capacity, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_member gm WHERE gm.group_id = g.group_id AND gm.status = 'ACTIVE') as currentMemberCount, g.auto_approve as autoApprove, g.schedule_policy as schedulePolicy, g.created_at as createdAt, g.updated_at as updatedAt FROM `group` g JOIN group_member m ON m.group_id = g.group_id WHERE m.user_key = #{userKey} AND m.status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT role FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_key = #{userKey} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT gm.group_id AS groupId, gm.user_key AS userKey, u.nickname AS displayName, gm.role, gm.status, gm.joined_at AS joinedAt, gm.left_at AS leftAt, (gb.user_key IS NOT NULL AND gb.active = 1) AS banned, gb.reason AS banReason FROM group_member gm LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.user_key = gm.user_key LEFT JOIN group_join_ban gb ON gb.group_id = gm.group_id AND gb.user_key = gm.user_key WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY gm.joined_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE group_member SET status = #{status}, left_at = NOW() WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_key = #{userKey}
mapper.select: SELECT group_id AS groupId, user_key AS userKey, role, status, joined_at AS joinedAt, left_at AS leftAt FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_key = #{userKey}
